title: CR Evangelion For pachinko not the movies
display_title: CR Evangelion For pachinko not the movies
wikitext:
[]: CR Evangelion - For pachinko, not the movies...             Quote Post by ixtl » Sun Dec 07, 2008 11:29 am Moved from here since these are patently not from the next movie. -Reichu Preview Screen Caps EVA-04 vs Ramiel

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Sun Dec 07, 2008 11:45 am Eva-04 with longinus lance in action

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sun Dec 07, 2008 11:46 am Where'd you get them?

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Sun Dec 07, 2008 11:47 am But, huh... Why would they fight ramiel again? And why is kaworu flying in front of eva-04? It looks really weird...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 07, 2008 11:50 am Looks like a fan reworking of scenes from 1.0 to me. It's mostly the Operation Yashima section, with Eva-01 and Eva-00 replaced by a solo Eva-04 (commanded by a levitating Kaworu, as per Eva-02 in #24). The ESV is replaced by the transparent shield, an accessory that came with the Kaiyodo action figure (and possibly other versions, I dunno): ...and the LnY replaces the Positron Rifle as the implement of Ramiel's doom. Notice how they emulate the final cut of 1.0, by putting Kaworu against the backdrop of the Moon (as opposed to Earth). Kind of cool. Wouldn't mind having SAUCE, and a bigger version.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun Dec 07, 2008 12:34 pm Reichu wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Sun Dec 07, 2008 12:37 pm Thanks a lot, friggin' new guy... I thought there was some news, but what did I get, nothing.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Dec 07, 2008 2:17 pm They blew their entire CG budget in the first film, so the rest of the Angels are going to be more Ramiels. Also, I just realized that summer of 2009 is still half a year away .

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 07, 2008 2:42 pm BobBQ wrote: Please don't tell me the MP5 with flashlight attachment was included in the box.

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Sun Dec 07, 2008 2:45 pm When the URL is long, do this. -Reichu

[]:             Quote Post by jim_loves_randy » Sun Dec 07, 2008 2:55 pm But where's the new girl? Inside the Eva?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 07, 2008 2:58 pm It's a Kaworu-centric version of Operation Yashima. Why does Mari need to be anywhere? Thanks for the bigger versions, qu4d. EDIT: The possibility now comes to mind that these could well be scans from the recently-released official Kaworu book -- albeit specially-created fan service. (I'm a little confused as to why the panel order is Western-style, though...)

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Dec 07, 2008 3:21 pm How can you tell they're Western style if there aren't any words?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 07, 2008 3:26 pm NAveryW wrote: How can you tell they're Western style if there aren't any words?

[]:             Quote Post by jim_loves_randy » Sun Dec 07, 2008 3:32 pm Reichu wrote: It's a Kaworu-centric version of Operation Yashima. Why does Mari need to be anywhere?

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Sun Dec 07, 2008 3:34 pm Why would spearing Ramiel cause her to burst into flames?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Dec 07, 2008 3:34 pm jim_loves_randy wrote: Oh okay nevermind, for some reason I thought they were official screenshots from the actual movie.

[]:             Quote Post by jim_loves_randy » Sun Dec 07, 2008 3:41 pm NAveryW wrote: Even if they were from the movie, why the deuce would Mari be required to be in them? Being in the movie does not mean being in every second of the movie.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 07, 2008 3:52 pm AyrYntake wrote: Why would spearing Ramiel cause her to burst into flames?

[]:             Quote Post by jim_loves_randy » Sun Dec 07, 2008 3:59 pm I didn't look carefully, just saw the Eva with the spear and Kaworu, and missed Ramiel. Can we please move on now?
